links.taskTemplate:
Generate the video from this script. Extract the scene-by-scene prompts and generate each scene via MiniMax API, then assemble with ffmpeg.

{output}

Add voiceover, background music, and subtitles to this raw video. Use the script text for the voiceover and subtitles. The pillar type determines the music style.

{output}

Publish this video to YouTube Shorts on @YourBodyExplained. Use the title, description, and video file path from the output below.

{output}

Publish this video to TikTok on @BodyExplained. Use the description and video file path from the output below.

{output}

schedule.task: Generate and publish next daily video for Your Body Explained
